title: Prototype 0.3
description: currently just adds some custom armor and weapons not much. later there will be bosses, extra mobs, A third set of armor, even more weapons, maybe vehicles, and a lot more.
body: not much to it right now. but here is what we have so far: two new sets of armor, sets one new weapon, one conveniant crafting recipy, some new items, and a new bench. i am thinking of adding more mobs, bosses, a third set of gear, WAY more weapons, and i am open to sugestions!
